title: SQL: Division by zero error
poc: create table test2 (bla1 double, bla2 double);
select case when (bla1 - bla2) > 0 then 1/(bla1 - bla2) else 0 end from test2;
select case when (2 - 2) > 0 then (3 - 2)/(2 - 2) else 0 end as "test";

select n1.lat, n1.long, n2.lat, n2.long, case when (n2.lat - n1.lat) > 0 then (n2.long - n1.long)/(n2.lat - n1.lat) else 0 end from nodes_legacy as n1, nodes_legacy as n2, segments where node1 = n1.id and node2 = n2.id limit 10;

CREATE TABLE "sys"."nodes_legacy" (
         "id" int,
         "long" double,
         "lat" double,
         "uid" int,
         "timestamp" timestamptz(7)
 );
key_bug_features: Division by zero in SQL case statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test3 (id int PRIMARY KEY, value double NOT NULL, description text);
INSERT INTO test3 VALUES (1, 0.0, 'Zero value'), (2, 1.0, 'Positive value'), (3, -1.0, 'Negative value');
SELECT CASE WHEN value > 0 THEN 1/value ELSE NULL END AS inverse FROM test3;
SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test3 WHERE value = 0) > 0 THEN 'Division by zero' ELSE 'Safe' END AS status;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.value, CASE WHEN (t2.value - t1.value) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (t2.value + t1.value)/(t2.value - t1.value) END AS ratio FROM test3 t1 JOIN test3 t2 ON t1.id <> t2.id;
